name: DeepInit clean-room (Codespaces)
//: A FRESH, ephemeral Ubuntu container for testing the MARKETPLACE build of DeepInit in a clean environment — no local ~/.claude, no pre-installed MCP servers, no VM. Node for the Claude Code CLI; Python 3.13 so the deterministic harness can also run here. See docs/TESTING.md > 'Clean-environment real-run (Codespaces)'.
postCreateCommand: npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code && python -m pip install --upgrade pip pyyaml && echo 'Ready. Authenticate: set the ANTHROPIC_API_KEY Codespace secret (also exercises the per-use $ path), or run `claude` then /login for subscription auth. Then follow docs/TESTING.md.'
